nasb.text: Now Abner had consultation with the elders of Israel, saying, “In times past you were seeking for David to be king over you.

esv.text: And Abner conferred with the elders of Israel, saying, “For some time past you have been seeking David as king over you.

cnv.text: 押尼珥與以色列的長老商議說：“從前你們希望大衛作你們的王。

ccb.text: 押尼珥和以色列的长老商量说：“你们以前一直都希望大卫做你们的王，
